ocr_findings.description: The 教師なし学習によるグループ分け diagram at top of page (geometric shapes being classified) is rendered as img-0.jpeg placeholder. The caption text '正解がなくても特徴を見つけて分類する' visible in the image callout bubble is absent from OCR. Low severity as this is a supplementary illustration.

The 強化学習 diagram (robot arm + board game illustration) is rendered as img-1.jpeg placeholder. The diagram labels '行動（駒を指す）' and '報酬（勝ち負け）' visible in the image arrows are absent from OCR. Low severity as the prose text above fully explains these concepts.

reviewer_notes: Page covers the 強化学習 section with two illustrations. All body text is accurately reproduced including the bold key phrase about 最適な過程. Both diagrams are replaced by image placeholders missing their embedded label text, but this is cosmetic since the prose provides equivalent explanation. The heading '◎● 強化学習' is rendered slightly differently in OCR (as '## 10 ● 強化学習') with an extra '10' prefix — this appears to be a section number artifact from OCR but does not affect content.
